// Features

Governed  automation  for  every  social  motion. 

Novi connects planning, generation, approvals, publishing, listening, and response logic into one precise operating layer. Build flows once, then let them adapt to campaign momentum.

01

Campaign Autopilot

Convert a launch brief into channel-specific calendars, copy variants, posting windows, and follow-up sequences.

02

Brand Guardrails

Apply tone, claim, compliance, and escalation rules before posts or replies reach your audience.

03

Signal Listening

Detect competitor movement, trending comments, creator mentions, and purchase-intent signals in real time.

Live workflow

When demo requests spike, Novi shifts content priority, activates reply templates, and alerts sales.

Adaptive scheduling

Posts move automatically when audience heatmaps change.

Creator routing

Assign tasks to internal teams, ambassadors, or creators.

Attribution loop

Connect social actions to pipeline and conversion events.

Unified inbox

Prioritize comments, DMs, mentions, and approvals in one queue.

Three  steps  to  scale. 

Our platform integrates deeply with your existing workflows to ensure seamless execution from day one, allowing you to focus on strategy.

01

02

03

Launch & Monitor

Activate your automations and watch as Novi handles execution. Monitor performance and adjust guardrails in real-time.

description: A high-performance dark-themed SaaS template designed for social media automation and growth marketing platforms with advanced workflow visualizations.
long_description:
## Overview
**Novi** is a premium, brand-forward landing page template tailored for high-growth **SaaS** companies specializing in social media automation. It features a sophisticated dark aesthetic with cyan accents, utilizing modern typography and high-impact video backgrounds to communicate technical authority and innovation.

## Key Features
- **Campaign Autopilot:** Interactive feature cards showcasing smart scheduling and adaptive workflows.
- **Signal Listening:** Real-time monitoring UI for competitor and engagement analytics.
- **Unified Inbox:** Integrated messaging queue and brand guardrail sections.
- **Multi-Channel Support:** Dedicated integration section for X (Twitter), LinkedIn, Instagram, and Threads.
- **Flexible Pricing:** Interactive monthly/annual billing toggle with tiered subscription plans.

## Primary Use Case
Perfect for launching a **Marketing Technology (MarTech)** product that requires a professional, high-trust digital presence to attract enterprise and startup clients alike.
